Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a DECLARE model and asked to add constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application process The process involves sensitive attributes eg ApplicantAge ApplicantGender ApplicantRace and decisions eg Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo We are to add constraints that ensure the sequence of activities does not discriminate based on these attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We note that the given model does not have any bias mitigating constraints We are to add new constraints We must decide on the constraints to add

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets think about the example given in the instructions We might require that for sensitive applicants which we might represent by specific activities that indicate the presence of a sensitive attribute certain decision steps like Reject must be preceded by a manual review or a bias mitigation check

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: However note that the model does not currently have activities for sensitive attributes We must assume that the process includes activities that reveal sensitive attributes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets assume the following activities that might be present in a real process CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantRace And decision activities Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to add constraints that ensure fairness

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Example constraints we might add a Coexistence If a decision activity eg Approve Reject is present then a ManualReview activity must also be present in the trace b Precedence Before making a decision eg Approve Reject a BiasMitigationCheck must have been performed c Non succession We might want to prevent that a sensitive attribute check eg CheckApplicantRace is immediately followed by a Reject without any intermediate activity

Name: Validation - IND
Text: However note that the example model does not have these activities We must extend the model with new activities and constraints

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: But note the instructions say to add new constraints to the given model We are allowed to add new activities The instructions do not specify but typically in DECLARE constraints are defined over activities that are part of the process

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Since the example model only has StartApplication FinalDecision and RequestAdditionalInfo we might need to add more activities However the instructions do not specify that we cannot add activities We are only told to add constraints

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Therefore I think we are allowed to add new activities to the model as part of the constraints Actually in DECLARE the activities are predefined and then constraints are set on them Since the instructions do not specify and the example model is just an example we might assume that we can extend the model with new activities

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets design a few constraints 1 We want to ensure that for every decision Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo there is a ManualReview activity that occurs in the trace This can be done with a coexistence constraint for each decision activity and ManualReview 2 We want to ensure that before a decision Approve Reject is made a BiasMitigationCheck activity must have occurred This can be done with a precedence constraint BiasMitigationCheck must precede the decision 3 We want to prevent that a CheckApplicantRace activity is immediately followed by a Reject We can use a non succession constraint

Name: Deductive Reasoning - IND
Text: But note the given model does not have the activities CheckApplicantRace Approve Reject ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck We are going to add these activities by adding constraints that involve them

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: But note the existing model has FinalDecision and RequestAdditionalInfo We might consider that FinalDecision is the decision activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets assume that the process has the following activities in addition to the existing ones CheckApplicantAge CheckApplicantGender CheckApplicantRace Approve which might be part of FinalDecision but we do not know Reject might be part of FinalDecision ManualReview BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets add the following constraints a For each decision activity we assume Approve Reject RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision we add a coexistence with ManualReview b We add a precedence constraint BiasMitigationCheck must precede Approve Reject and FinalDecision c We add a non succession constraint CheckApplicantRace to Reject is forbidden

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We might also add a chainresponse constraint that if CheckApplicantRace occurs then the next activity must be BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This ensures that immediately after CheckApplicantRace the next activity is BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are adding new constraints without removing the existing ones Lets update the model accordingly

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: The existing model has a key for each constraint type We are adding to the existing lists

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will add to coexistence Approve with ManualReview Reject with ManualReview FinalDecision with ManualReview In precedence Approve with BiasMitigationCheck Reject with BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision with BiasMitigationCheck In nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace with Reject In chainresponse CheckApplicantRace with BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We are not adding any unary constraints for these new activities like existence We are only adding binary constraints We might also want to add existence constraints for the new activities For example we might want to require that ManualReview exists in every trace if there is a decision But note the coexistence constraint already ensures that if a decision activity is present then ManualReview is present This is acceptable because we are only concerned when there is a decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We are going to copy the existing model and then add the new constraints to the appropriate keys We must be careful to not overwrite the existing constraints

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For coexistence declare model coexistence Approve ManualReview Reject ManualReview FinalDecision ManualReview For precedence declare model precedence Approve BiasMitigationCheck Reject BiasMitigationCheck FinalDecision BiasMitigationCheck For nonsuccession declare model nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace Reject For chainresponse declare model chainresponse CheckApplicantRace BiasMitigationCheck

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: We added Coexistence constraints for Approve Reject and FinalDecision with ManualReview to ensure that every decision is accompanied by a manual review reducing the chance of automated bias Precedence constraints for Approve Reject and FinalDecision to be preceded by BiasMitigationCheck ensuring that a bias check is performed before any decision A non succession constraint to prevent that CheckApplicantRace is immediately followed by Reject avoiding immediate biased rejections based on race A chainresponse constraint to ensure that CheckApplicantRace is immediately followed by BiasMitigationCheck so that after checking race a bias mitigation step is taken These constraints together aim to make the process more fair by ensuring that sensitive attributes are not used in a discriminatory way
